note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Zoë's late-night coding session is disrupted by an unsettling, anonymous message. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Zoë frantically searches for a noise-cancelling headset to block out the eerie silence. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden research on the lottery's statistical anomalies. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Zoë ponders Mateo's cryptic message as she tries to focus on her work. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Zoë frantically searches for a hidden tracking device in her belongings. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Mateo's cryptic message sparks Zoë's investigation into Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Zoë discovers Mateo's cryptic notes on the lottery algorithm and its unsettling connection to Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden server, sparking a desperate search for answers Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Zoë discovers a suspicious discrepancy in the lottery algorithm's code. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Zoë discovers a cryptic message on Mateo's computer, hinting at an imminent catastrophe. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Zoë discovers a disturbing pattern in the lottery data, hinting at an unknown force manipulating the outcomes. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden server, sparking a desperate search for answers Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Zoë confronts Mateo about Marina's cryptic message and the eerie silence from Dr. Baeza. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo's lottery code analysis sparks a disturbing connection to Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Zoë realizes Mateo's lottery wins are linked to the anomalies. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Signal-to-Noise") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
